name: lighthouse-keepers-room
summary: The keeper's living quarters partway up the lighthouse — a narrow room hugging the tower wall, a cot, a potbelly stove, the log for the beam's nightly tending.

primary_palette.note: watch station at the seaward window
if this IS the lamp room — the beam's mechanism dominates

story_prompts: the keeper is overdue below — the lamp is guttering and something is in the stairwell
a wreck tonight was deliberate — the keeper's log is torn out
the keeper hasn't left this room in a decade and knows every ship by name
a stranger sleeps in the cot; the real keeper is not here

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm interior (0.35-0.45), stove plus lantern; dramatic beam-spill if lamp room

anti_patterns: the outer wall curves — use rounded corner trims, don't leave hard square corners
don't overload — this is one person's life, intimately small
the stove is against a masonry section of wall, never the wooden floor-center
